name: AngleList
summary: This class provides methods to handle lists of angles

methods.name: Parse(String)
methods.summary: Parses the given text as an angle list in the current unit type

methods.name: Parse(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.summary: Parses the given text as an angle list in the current unit type

methods.name: Parse(String, IFormatProvider, Angle.UnitType)
methods.summary: Parses the given text as an angle list in the current unit type

methods.name: ToString(IEnumerable.Angle.)
methods.summary: Converts the given angles to a string in the current units

methods.name: ToString(IEnumerable.Angle., Angle.UnitType)
methods.summary: Converts the given angles to a string in the given units

methods.name: ToString(IEnumerable.Angle., String, IFormatProvider)
methods.summary: Converts the given angles to a string with the given parameters in the current unit

methods.summary: Converts the given angles to a string with the given parameters in the current unit
